meanings.usage: 指将食物或饮料从嘴咽下经过食道进入胃
英式英语常用，美语多用bathroom/restroom
本课中双关语：既指找回的零钱，也指从厕所出来的东西
不可数名词，指打扫、洗衣等家庭劳动
人体器官，用于吃东西和说话
指比预定或应该的时间晚
一天中的第一顿饭，break+fast（禁食）
指物体从手中或其他地方掉落
指两个人或事物，常与and连用

examples.en: He was going into the dining room.
He dropped some coins on the floor.
examples.zh: 他把一些硬币掉在了地板上。

examples.en: We looked for them, but we could not find them all.
examples.zh: 我们找了，但没能全部找到。

examples.en: He put them both into his mouth.
examples.zh: 他把两枚硬币都放进了嘴里。

examples.en: We both tried to get the coins.
examples.zh: 我们都试图把硬币拿出来。

examples.en: My husband phoned me from the office.
examples.zh: 我丈夫从办公室给我打电话。
当我们正在吃早餐的时候。

examples.en: Tommy's been to the toilet three times this morning.
examples.zh: Tommy今天早上已经上了三次厕所了。

examples.en: Late that morning, when I was doing the housework.
examples.zh: 那天上午晚些时候，我正在做家务。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去某一时刻正在进行的动作，通常与另一过去动作连用，说明背景
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去正在进行的动作，为主要事件提供时间背景

examples.en: When my husband was going into the dining room this morning, he dropped some coins.
examples.zh: 今天早上我丈夫走进餐厅时，把一些硬币掉在了地上。

examples.en: While we were having breakfast, our little boy found two small coins.
examples.zh: 当我们正在吃早餐时，我们的小男孩在地上发现了两枚小硬币。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作，强调'过去的过去'
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述在叙述的过去时间点之前已经完成的动作

examples.en: Tommy had already swallowed them before we could get the coins.
examples.zh: 在我们能够拿到硬币之前，Tommy已经把硬币吞下去了。

examples.en: We could not find them all because someone had taken them.
examples.zh: 我们没能全部找到，因为有人已经把它们拿走了。

grammar.title: 双关语 (Pun) - change
grammar.definition: 一个词有两个相关但不同的含义，产生幽默或俏皮的效果
grammar.structure: 同一个词在不同语境中的双重含义
grammar.usage: 本课中change既指硬币零钱，又指从厕所排出（换尿布时'找零'）

examples.en: I haven't had any change yet.
examples.zh: 我还没有任何'找零'呢。（双关：既指零钱，也指孩子排便）

sentencePatterns.pattern: When + 过去进行时, 过去时

original.en: When my husband was going into the dining room, he dropped some coins.
original.zh: 当我丈夫走进餐厅时，他把硬币掉在了地上。

imitations.en: When she was walking home, she found a wallet.
imitations.zh: 当她走路回家时，她发现了一个钱包。

imitations.en: When I was cooking dinner, the phone rang.
imitations.zh: 当我做晚饭时，电话响了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: While + 过去进行时, 过去进行时

original.en: While we were having breakfast, Tommy found two coins.
original.zh: 当我们正在吃早餐时，Tommy发现了两枚硬币。

imitations.en: While they were watching TV, the power went out.
imitations.zh: 当他们正在看电视时停电了。

imitations.en: While I was reading, my brother was playing games.
imitations.zh: 当我看书时，我弟弟正在玩游戏。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + have/has been to + 地点 + 次数

original.en: Tommy's been to the toilet three times this morning.
original.zh: Tommy今天早上已经上了三次厕所了。

imitations.en: He's been to the doctor twice this week.
imitations.zh: 这周他已经看过两次医生了。

imitations.en: She's been to the library three times this month.
imitations.zh: 这个月她已经去过图书馆三次了。

imitations.en: She had already left when I arrived.
imitations.zh: 当我到达时她已经离开了。

imitations.en: The movie had already started when we got there.
imitations.zh: 当我们到达那里时电影已经开始了。
